# Description

# [PKT-PRV-039](task-0106): Provider SSL/TLS Support

## Purpose

Implement provider SSL/TLS support.

## Scope

- SSL configuration
- Certificate handling
- Validation

## Implementation

1. Configure SSL
2. Handle certs
3. Add validation

## Acceptance Criteria

1. SSL configured
2. Certs handled
3. Validated
